com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXLibraryObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXLibraryAssembly, IXLibraryBackshell, IXLibraryBackshellPlug, IXLibraryBackshellSeal, IXLibraryBaseAssembly, IXLibraryBaseConnector, IXLibraryCavityContainer, IXLibraryCavityGroup, IXLibraryCavityPlug, IXLibraryCavitySeal, IXLibraryClip, IXLibraryConnector, IXLibraryConnectorSeal, IXLibraryDevice, IXLibraryFixture, IXLibraryGrommet, IXLibraryHeatshrinkSleeve, IXLibraryIDCConnector, IXLibraryInHouseAssembly, IXLibraryMulticore, IXLibraryOther, IXLibraryRingTerminalGroup, IXLibrarySolderSleeve, IXLibrarySplice, IXLibraryTape, IXLibraryTerminal, IXLibraryTube, IXLibraryUltrasonicWeld, IXLibraryWire

    public interface IXLibraryObject
extends IXWriteableObject
    Interface for accessing library details for the part.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXLibraryColorCode getColorCode()
      Get the library color code.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXLibraryComponentScope> getComponentScopeCodes()
      Gets component scope codes defined for a library part.
      IXLibraryComponentTypeCode getComponentTypeCode()
      Get the library component type code.
      java.util.Set<IXLibraryCustomerPartNumber> getCustomerPartNumbers()
      Gets customer part numbers defined for a library part.
      java.util.Set<IXLibraryHousingDefinition> getHousingDefinitions()
      Gets Housing definitions defined for the library part.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXLibraryNote> getLibraryNotes()
      Gets all the modification history notes for the part.
      IXLibraryNoteSetter getLibraryNoteSetter()
      Gets IXLibraryNoteSetter for the part using this modification history notes can be set on the part.
      IXLibraryRevisionGroup getLibraryRevisionGroup()
      Get the library revision group to which this component belongs.
      java.util.Set<IXLibrarySymbol> getLibrarySymbols()
      Gets all symbol details
      IXLibraryMaterialCode getMaterialCode()
      Get the library material code.
      IXLibraryObject getStoredLibraryObject()
      Gets the currently stored version of the library part.
      java.util.Set<IXLibrarySupplierPartNumber> getSupplierPartNumbers()
      Gets supplier part numbers defined for a library part.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

    • Method Detail

      • getColorCode

        IXLibraryColorCode getColorCode()
        Get the library color code.
        Returns:
        the library color code associated .

      • getMaterialCode

        IXLibraryMaterialCode getMaterialCode()
        Get the library material code.
        Returns:
        the library material code associated .

      • getComponentTypeCode

        IXLibraryComponentTypeCode getComponentTypeCode()
        Get the library component type code.
        Returns:
        the component type code associated .

      • getLibraryRevisionGroup

        IXLibraryRevisionGroup getLibraryRevisionGroup()
        Get the library revision group to which this component belongs.
        Returns:
        the revision group associated. If null it means this object is single revisioned object.

      • getCustomerPartNumbers

        java.util.Set<IXLibraryCustomerPartNumber> getCustomerPartNumbers()
        Gets customer part numbers defined for a library part.
        Returns:
        Set<IXLibraryCustomerPartNumber>
        See Also:
        IXLibraryCustomerPartNumber

      • getSupplierPartNumbers

        java.util.Set<IXLibrarySupplierPartNumber> getSupplierPartNumbers()
        Gets supplier part numbers defined for a library part.
        Returns:
        Set<IXLibrarySupplierPartNumber>
        See Also:
        IXLibrarySupplierPartNumber

        java.util.Set<IXLibraryHousingDefinition> getHousingDefinitions()
        Gets Housing definitions defined for the library part.

        java.util.Set<IXLibrarySymbol> getLibrarySymbols()
        Gets all symbol details
        Returns:
        Set
        See Also:
        IXLibrarySymbol

      • getComponentScopeCodes

        java.util.Set<? extends IXLibraryComponentScope> getComponentScopeCodes()
        Gets component scope codes defined for a library part. From this component scope code we can get the library scope code associated
        Returns:
        Set<IXLibraryComponentScope>
        See Also:
        IXLibraryComponentScope

      • getLibraryNotes

        java.util.Set<? extends IXLibraryNote> getLibraryNotes()
        Gets all the modification history notes for the part.
        Returns:
        Set<IXLibraryNote>
        See Also:
        IXLibraryNote

      • getStoredLibraryObject

        IXLibraryObject getStoredLibraryObject()
        Gets the currently stored version of the library part. If the object is the modified object it returns the stored(unmodified) version of the object. If this object is a new object which is not persisted it will return null.If it is already an unmodified\DB version it will return itself. This can be used to find the change set in edit mode to locate what has changed in the current library part
        Returns:
        IXLibraryObject

      • getLibraryNoteSetter

        IXLibraryNoteSetter getLibraryNoteSetter()
        Gets IXLibraryNoteSetter for the part using this modification history notes can be set on the part.
        Returns:
        IXLibraryNoteSetter
        See Also:
        IXLibraryNoteSetter
